Class JumpingSlash

java.lang.Object
MyGame.GameObject.Skill.JumpingSlash
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActiveSkill, Renderable
public class JumpingSlash extends Object implements ActiveSkill
A skill representing a jumping slash attack.
